title: Belum Caves
tagline: Belum Caves — heritage city of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Belum Caves are a limestone cave system located in Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Belum Caves are a limestone cave system located in Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Extending over 3.23 km (2.01 mi), it is the second-largest cave network in the country. Archaeological evidence indicates human activity in the caves as early as 4500 BCE, and the site was later used by Buddhist and Jain ascetics. The caves were formed by persistent hyrdological erosion during wetter climatic conditions that existed during the Pre-Pliocene period.

topPlaces.name: Kolimigundla mandal
topPlaces.description: Kolimigundla mandal is a mandal in Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The mandal is administered from its namesake village Kolimigundla.

topPlaces.name: Kolimigundla
topPlaces.description: Kolimigundla (Telugu: కొలిమిగుండ్ల) is a village and headquarters of Kolimigundla mandal in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanakadripalli
topPlaces.description: Kanakadripalli is a village in Kolimigundla mandal Nandyal District, Andhra Pradesh, India. It belongs to the Rayalaseema Area.

items.note: Kolimigundla mandal is a mandal in Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The mandal is administered from its namesake village Kolimigundla.
Kolimigundla (Telugu: కొలిమిగుండ్ల) is a village and headquarters of Kolimigundla mandal in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
Kanakadripalli is a village in Kolimigundla mandal Nandyal District, Andhra Pradesh, India. It belongs to the Rayalaseema Area.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Belum Caves?
faq.a: The best time to visit Belum Caves is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Belum Caves?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (216 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Belum Caves?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Belum Caves at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Belum Caves?
faq.a: Stays in Belum Caves start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Belum Caves?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kolimigundla mandal, Kolimigundla, Kanakadripalli.
